mapper.select: SELECT sm.*, u.username AS sender_name FROM support_messages sm LEFT JOIN users u ON sm.sender_id = u.id WHERE sm.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY sm.created_at ASC, sm.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO support_messages (session_id, sender_id, sender_role, content, is_read_by_user, is_read_by_admin, created_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{senderId}, #{senderRole}, #{content}, #{isReadByUser}, #{isReadByAdmin}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE support_messages SET is_read_by_user = TRUE WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND sender_role = 'ADMIN'
UPDATE support_messages SET is_read_by_admin = TRUE WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND sender_role = 'USER'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM support_messages WHERE sender_role = 'USER' AND is_read_by_admin = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM support_messages sm JOIN support_sessions ss ON sm.session_id = ss.id WHERE ss.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.sender_role = 'ADMIN' AND sm.is_read_by_user = FALSE
